nasb.text: Yet I planted you a choice vine, A completely faithful seed. How then have you turned yourself before Me Into the degenerate shoots of a foreign vine?

esv.text: Yet I planted you a choice vine, wholly of pure seed. How then have you turned degenerate and become a wild vine?

cnv.text: 我栽你時原是上等的葡萄樹， 是絕對純種的； 你怎麼在我面前變為壞枝子， 成了野葡萄呢？

ccb.text: 你原本是我栽种的上等葡萄树， 是最好的品种。 你怎么自甘堕落， 变成了野葡萄？
